item.description:
# Clip 1.3.5
Clip 1.3.5 tightens and simplifies the custom native Live Share window header.
## Live Share
- Reduce the shared-window header height so it uses less vertical space. - Remove the shared translucent background behind the viewer controls. - Render Zoom and Close as separate black controls with independent hover feedback, so hovering one no longer highlights both. - Keep the zoom icon and current percentage together as one button.
This is an app-only update. The Live Share server and web viewer are unchanged.
## Requirements
Clip requires macOS 15 or later on Apple silicon. This build uses the same stable Apple Development identity as previous updater releases.
